blocks.text: Meeting Minutes: Distribution Network Review Working Session
Working session held at the offices of {{fact:f:E-1998-001.client}}. Minutes prepared by Andrea Diaz and circulated to all attendees for correction.

items: Kimberly Price, Senior Consultant, Cindergrove Advisors Inc
Andrea Diaz, Consultant, Cindergrove Advisors Inc
Adam Cook, Director of Operations, Ramos, Gill and Garcia

blocks.text: Kimberly Price opened the session with a summary of fieldwork completed to date. The warehouse walk-throughs are finished, and the freight records furnished by the client have been tabulated. She reported that the interviews with scheduling supervisors are proceeding on schedule and that the baseline analysis will follow once the records are settled.

Adam Cook raised a concern regarding carrier invoices that could not be matched to bills of lading. Andrea Diaz confirmed that a number of invoices remain unmatched and stated that she has not yet determined whether the gap lies in the records themselves or in the filing; she will report on the question once she has traced it rather than offer a guess. The group agreed that the matter should be settled before any baseline figures are presented.

rows: Reconcile the unmatched carrier invoices against bills of lading and report the cause
Furnish warehouse staffing rosters to the engagement team
Circulate the draft baseline analysis for internal review
